notes: Free admission on the first Friday of the month.
raw: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. *This is an e-pass which will be emailed to you and must be used on the selected date.* The Discovery Museum offers free admission for all on the first Friday of each month, October to June from 4:30 to 8:00pm.
